compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect debug-everything restructure and fix-bug orchestrator promotion
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md architecture section, debug-everything quick reference, and relevant workflow docs to reflect the two-mode restructure (bug-fix mode + validation mode), fix-bug's orchestrator-level promotion, configurable iteration cap, and interactivity question
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the restructured orchestration flow to avoid dispatching fix-bug as a sub-agent or expecting the old diagnostic-first flow
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture table and orchestration flow; debug-everything SKILL.md quick reference and orchestration flow diagram; dso-config.conf example/docs for debug.max_fix_validate_cycles
- OUT: Epic B classification gate documentation (separate epic)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md accurately describes debug-everything's two-mode flow and fix-bug's orchestrator-level invocation
  ← Satisfies: "In a dogfooding session with 3+ open bug tickets, the restructured pipeline completes the fix loop" (agents need accurate docs to use the restructured flow)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT: doc-writer agent completed. FILES_MODIFIED: plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (added debug.max_fix_validate_cycles entry + last_synced_commit frontmatter). CLAUDE.md suggested-change report emitted (not written — read-only safeguard). STATUS: pass
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Updated CLAUDE.md architecture section + CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md for debug-everything restructure.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
